findings.label: OpenCode plugin bridge native route uses launcher MCP subprocess, not compat import
evidence: .opencode/skills/system-skill-advisor/mcp_server/plugin_bridges/mk-skill-advisor-bridge.mjs:273 loadNativeAdvisorModules maps native calls to callAdvisorTool over the launcher subprocess

findings.label: fail-open masks native probe failure as route python unavailable
precise failure is stale launcher lease without IPC socket
evidence: .opencode/bin/lib/launcher-ipc-bridge.cjs:123 writes LEASE_HELD_BY with no-bridge-socket to stdout

findings.label: compat entrypoint is healthy and should be the bridge primary path
evidence: direct import listed buildSkillAdvisorBrief, handleAdvisorRecommend, probeAdvisorDaemon, readAdvisorStatus, renderAdvisorBrief
direct readAdvisorStatus returned freshness live generation 4466 skillCount 23

remediation: Update .opencode/skills/system-skill-advisor/mcp_server/plugin_bridges/mk-skill-advisor-bridge.mjs so loadNativeAdvisorModules imports ../dist/mcp_server/compat/index.js first and only falls back to launcher MCP subprocess on import failure.

Update .opencode/bin/lib/launcher-ipc-bridge.cjs or .opencode/bin/mk-skill-advisor-launcher.cjs so held lease without daemon-ipc.sock is stale/reclaimable or machine-readable failure, not non-JSON stdout in an MCP client path.
